file_insights.changes_summary: Added PTY fallback mechanism with 4 new functions, 1 helper, and 11 tests

key_functions.name: extract_pct_after
key_functions.purpose: Parse percentage values after anchor strings (e.g., '5h limit: 42%')

key_functions.name: parse_pty_output
key_functions.purpose: Parse PTY screen output for '5h limit: NN%' and 'Weekly limit: NN%' patterns

key_functions.name: pty_exchange
key_functions.purpose: Inner async function: spawn codex, write /status, read stdout

key_functions.name: fetch_via_rpc_or_pty
key_functions.purpose: Try JSON-RPC first; fall back to PTY if RPC has no data

patterns_discovered.description: OAuth credentials → JSON-RPC → PTY as last resort
Separate outer timeout function from inner implementation to keep async logic clean
patterns_discovered.benefit: Readable error handling for timeout vs failure cases

patterns_discovered.description: Search for string anchor, trim, parse digits, clamp to valid range
patterns_discovered.robustness: Handles missing anchors, no digits, out-of-range values gracefully

patterns_discovered.description: Each snapshot includes source field ('oauth', 'rpc', 'pty') for debugging
patterns_discovered.benefit: Logs indicate which fallback was successful

patterns_discovered.description: Parser finds anchors even when ANSI codes are interspersed in output

gotchas_discovered.description: codex spawned via piped stdin/stdout behaves differently than real TTY; may not render status screen correctly
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Marked as 'best-effort' in code comments; graceful error handling if output is empty

gotchas_discovered.description: PTY output could contain >100% or <0% values; clamping required
gotchas_discovered.solution: extract_pct_after clamps to u8 with min(100)

gotchas_discovered.description: Must explicitly kill child process after reading or process lingers
gotchas_discovered.solution: kill_on_drop(true) set at spawn; explicit kill() after read loop

gotchas_discovered.description: 3-second global timeout may be too aggressive or too lenient depending on system load
gotchas_discovered.evidence: Code includes 500ms sleep before read + nested 500ms read timeouts
gotchas_discovered.note: May need tuning based on actual codex behavior in production

gotchas_discovered.description: Non-blocking read loop with 500ms timeout between chunks; late-arriving output abandoned
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: 4KB buffer + loop to accumulate output; breaks on EOF or timeout

approach_details.description: Add PTY fallback to CodexProvider fetch() when JSON-RPC fails
approach_details.backwards_compatibility: Full (existing RPC path unchanged; PTY only triggered on RPC failure)

recommendations.recommendation: Migrate from pipes to real PTY library (e.g., 'pty-rs' crate) for reliable codex interaction
recommendations.rationale: Current best-effort approach relies on pipes which codex may detect as non-TTY and disable features

recommendations.recommendation: Profile actual codex response time under load; adjust 3-second timeout and 500ms sleep/read intervals
recommendations.rationale: Current hardcoded durations may not match real-world latency distribution

recommendations.recommendation: Log which fallback path succeeded (oauth/rpc/pty) and include source field in structured logs
recommendations.rationale: source='pty' already in ProviderSnapshot; extend to telemetry to track fallback frequency

recommendations.recommendation: Document the best-effort nature of PTY fallback in user-facing docs; caveat that some codex features may be unavailable
recommendations.rationale: Current code comments explain well; external users should know limitations

recommendations.recommendation: Consider retry logic with exponential backoff for temporary codex failures (e.g., socket timeouts)
recommendations.rationale: Current implementation is single-shot; transient network issues cause immediate fallback
